title: Here Are Our Predictions in 12 Key 2026 Grammy Races, Including Album of the Year
text: Billboard's analysis of the Album of the Year category identifies presumed front-runners as Bad Bunny with Debí Tirar Más Fotos, Lady Gaga with MAYHEM, and Kendrick Lamar with GNX. Regardless of winner, this category will crown a first-time victor. Bad Bunny's album would be the inaugural all-Spanish language album to win while Lamar's would mark only the third hip-hop album victory and first by a male solo rapper. The Recording Academy expanded Latin voting membership substantially with nearly 1,000 Latin Recording Academy members joining, potentially benefiting Bunny. Additionally, Bad Bunny is set to headline the Super Bowl halftime show one week after the Grammys. Three rap albums competing simultaneously could fragment votes, though precedent exists with OutKast winning in 2004 despite competing hip-hop entries. Lamar faces recurring disappointment, having received four prior nominations without victory. Meanwhile, hip-hop hasn't won this category since OutKast's Speakerboxxx/The Love Below in 2004. Billboard's prediction favors Kendrick Lamar's GNX for the category.
